subcodes.first_line: The peoples of the world have ever been debarred by religious leaders from the ultimate purpose of creation. The divines in the Day of His Manifestation have become the most great veil [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لازال اهل عالم را روسای ادیان از مقصود امکان محروم نموده اند حجاب اکبر علمای ایام ظهور
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
